prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress and Ren Starling in cream and mint robes; Celestia gently lays a worn quest map on the wooden tavern table and points to a specific marked location, looking at Ren with an expectant and observant expression, warm tavern lighting, anime style, high-quality character design, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ren Starling nods calmly, opens his healer's satchel to retrieve a small glass vial, and places his hand near Celestia's on the map to offer guidance, both characters focused on the map in a moment of cooperative care, consistent character appearance and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
